hello: Hello! How can I help you today?
hey: Hey! Hope you're having a wonderful day.

who are you: I am RuleBot AI, a professional rule-based chatbot built with Python.
who made you: I was created as a professional software engineering project.

python: Python is a powerful programming language used for AI, web development, automation, data science and scripting.

oop: Object-Oriented Programming organizes software into reusable classes and objects.
software engineering: Software engineering focuses on designing, developing, testing and maintaining software.
clean code: Clean code is readable, maintainable and easy to understand.
api: An API allows different software applications to communicate with each other.
database: A database stores and manages information efficiently.
portfolio: A strong portfolio demonstrates practical skills through real-world projects.
resume: A resume summarizes your education, skills and experience.
interview: Preparation, communication and practical knowledge are essential for technical interviews.
